examiner_note: Nói về thói quen hàng ngày. Sử dụng 'sedentary lifestyle', 'incorporate into routine', 'health-conscious'.

band7.text: Yes, I do, especially on weekdays. I usually walk to nearby places like cafés or the supermarket, so it’s part of my daily routine rather than a workout. It helps me stay active without going to the gym.
band7.note: Sử dụng từ vựng đời thường tốt (daily routine, active).

band8.text: To be honest, I try to incorporate as much walking as possible into my schedule to combat a sedentary lifestyle. I often opt for the stairs instead of the elevator and take brisk walks during my lunch break to clear my head and stay refreshed.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (incorporate, combat, sedentary, opt for, brisk).

band9.text: I’m quite a health-conscious individual, so walking is an integral part of my day. I find it to be a meditative practice that allows me to decompress while remaining physically active. Whether it’s a morning stroll or a longer hike on weekends, I relish the opportunity to be on my feet and experience my surroundings at a slower pace.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng linh hoạt (integral, meditative, decompress, relish).

v.example: Office jobs can lead to a sedentary lifestyle.
A brisk walk is good for the heart.
Walking helps me decompress after work.

advanced_vocab.example: Walking is an integral part of my fitness regime.

similar_questions: Do you prefer walking in the city or the countryside?
What are the benefits of walking?
